meta.title: BillBhai - Smart Billing and Inventory for Modern Businesses
meta.description: BillBhai is the all-in-one billing, inventory, and order management platform built for Indian businesses. Fast invoices, real-time stock tracking, and powerful analytics.

hero.subtitle: BillBhai is the all-in-one platform for invoicing, inventory tracking, and order management - designed for speed, built for Indian businesses.

features.title: Everything your business needs
features.description: From lightning-fast invoicing to granular inventory control, BillBhai packs enterprise power into a beautifully simple interface.

items.title: Instant Invoicing
items.description: Generate professional GST-compliant invoices in seconds. Auto-calculate taxes, discounts, and totals with zero errors.

items.title: Real-Time Inventory
items.description: Track stock levels across locations with real-time updates. Get low-stock alerts before you run out and never miss a sale.

items.title: Delivery Tracking
items.description: Monitor deliveries from dispatch to doorstep. Real-time status updates keep you and your customers in the loop.

items.title: Smart Analytics
items.description: Understand your business with interactive charts, revenue trends, and category breakdowns - all updated in real time.

items.title: Multi-User Access
items.description: Add team members with role-based permissions. Admins, managers, and staff each see exactly what they need.

items.title: Returns and Refunds
items.description: Handle product returns and issue refunds seamlessly. Automatic stock updates and customer communication are built in.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.description: No complex setup. No training needed. Just sign up and start billing.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up in 30 seconds with just your email. No credit card required to start your free trial.

steps.title: Add Your Products
steps.description: Import your catalog via CSV or add items manually. Set prices, categories, and stock levels in one go.

steps.title: Start Billing
steps.description: Create invoices, track orders, and manage inventory - all from a single beautiful dashboard.

testimonials.title: Loved by businesses
testimonials.description: See what our users have to say about BillBhai.

items.name: Rahul Sharma
items.quote: BillBhai transformed how we handle billing. What used to take 15 minutes per invoice now takes seconds. The inventory tracking alone saved us lakhs.

items.name: Priya Patel
items.quote: We switched from paper billing to BillBhai and saw a 40 percent increase in order accuracy. The analytics dashboard gives me insights I never had before.

items.name: Amit Kumar
items.quote: The delivery tracking feature is a game-changer. Our customers love the real-time updates, and returns handling has become completely painless.

cta.title: Ready to simplify your business?
cta.description: Join 500+ businesses already using BillBhai. Start your free trial today with no credit card required.
cta.note: Free 14-day trial - No credit card - Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: Smart billing and inventory management for modern Indian businesses.
